articles.title: Harmful bacteria persist in Merrimack River days after Haverhill sewer break
articles.description:
Water testing continues to detect elevated bacteria levels despite an emergency bypass, while some shellfish harvesting areas remain closed.

The post Harmful bacteria persist in Merrimack River days after Haverhill sewer break appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Water testing shows elevated bacteria levels in Merrimack River after Haverhill sewer break.
Shellfish harvesting areas remain closed due to ongoing contamination concerns.
Residents advised to avoid river contact until further notice to ensure safety.

articles.title: Boater remains missing after crash off of Salisbury Beach
articles.description:
Two people were rescued and brought to local hospitals following the Friday night crash, but one man is still missing.

The post Boater remains missing after crash off of Salisbury Beach     appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One man remains missing after a boating crash off Salisbury Beach on Friday night.
Two individuals were rescued and hospitalized following the incident.
Search efforts continue, impacting local boating safety and community concerns.

articles.title: After officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding, Adam Sandler played pickup basketball in this Mass. vacation hotspot
articles.description:
Comedian Adam Sandler surprised a group of pickup basketball players in Massachusetts by jumping in for a game on Sunday, less than 48 hours after officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding in New York City.

The post After officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding, Adam Sandler played pickup basketball in this Mass. vacation hotspot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Adam Sandler joined a pickup basketball game in Nantucket on Sunday.
Sandler officiated Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding just 48 hours prior.
His appearance boosts local tourism and community engagement in Nantucket.

articles.title: Local obituary: Oliver Lewis, 15, ‘an old soul, with wisdom far beyond his years’
articles.description:
"To know Oliver was to know true kindness."

The post Local obituary: Oliver Lewis, 15, ‘an old soul, with wisdom far beyond his years’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Oliver Lewis, 15, remembered for his kindness and wisdom in Boston community.
His passing has deeply affected friends and family, highlighting the importance of youth support.
Local organizations plan to honor Oliver's legacy through community kindness initiatives.

articles.title: Poll: Most in Mass. think police hid evidence in Karen Read case
articles.description:
Nearly two-thirds of Bay Staters also believed police conduct in Read’s case was definitely or probably indicative of a wider problem with policing in Massachusetts.

The post Poll: Most in Mass. think police hid evidence in Karen Read case appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Poll reveals nearly two-thirds of Massachusetts residents suspect police hid evidence in Karen Read case.
66% of Bay Staters believe police conduct reflects broader issues in Massachusetts policing.
Concerns over police transparency may influence public trust and future law enforcement policies.

articles.title: Duxbury man drowns while swimming to his boat
articles.description:
Authorities received reports about a swimmer in distress in Duxbury Bay just after 4:30 p.m. Sunday.

The post Duxbury man drowns while swimming to his boat appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Duxbury man drowned while swimming to his boat in Duxbury Bay on Sunday.
Authorities received distress reports shortly after 4:30 p.m. on July 6.
This incident raises safety concerns for local swimmers and boaters in the area.

articles.title: Groveland ice cream shop goes viral with scoop-tossing video
articles.description:
A playful video of employees "throwing out" ice cream into the owner’s mouth has racked up tens of millions of views, drawing attention to Jeff and Maria’s in Groveland.

The post Groveland ice cream shop goes viral with scoop-tossing video appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Groveland's ice cream shop, Jeff and Maria's, gained viral fame from a scoop-tossing video.
The video has accumulated tens of millions of views, boosting local interest and foot traffic.
Boston residents are encouraged to visit the shop, enhancing community engagement and support.

articles.title: Celtics sign first-round pick Chris Cenac Jr.
articles.description:
Boston's newest big man has signed his rookie deal.

The post Celtics sign first-round pick Chris Cenac Jr. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics signed first-round pick Chris Cenac Jr. to his rookie deal on July 6.
Cenac Jr. is expected to bolster the Celtics' frontcourt for the upcoming season.
Local fans anticipate increased competitiveness in the team's performance this year.
